tags.description: Unified AI v3 chat lifecycle and messaging

tags.name: metadata-import-export

tags.name: schema
tags.description: Browse physical schema and merged metadata facets

get.description: Returns the descriptor for the given facet type. typeKey may be a prefixed slug (e.g. descriptive), legacy short key, or a full URN.

parameters.name: typeKey
parameters.description: Facet type slug or URN, e.g. descriptive

put.description: Replaces the descriptor for the given facet type key. typeKey in the body is overridden by the path variable.

parameters.name: typeKey
parameters.description: Facet type slug or URN to update

delete.description: Removes the facet type descriptor. Returns 409 if the type is mandatory.

parameters.name: typeKey
parameters.description: Facet type slug or URN to delete

409.description: Facet type cannot be deleted due to constraints

get.description: `{id}` must be a full percent-encoded Mill entity URN (`urn:mill/…`). Legacy dot-path keys are rejected with 400.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Full entity URN (encode `/` as %2F) or UrnSlug path segment (no `/`; see io.qpointz.mill.UrnSlug)

400.description: Path id is not a Mill URN

get.description: Returns all registered scopes. The scopeUrn field in each entry is a full Mill scope URN.

post.description: Creates a scope with the given URN key. Returns 409 if the scope already exists.

Accepts a multipart/form-data upload with the YAML file in the `file` part. Supports entities: and facet-types: sections. Multi-document YAML is accepted. mode=REPLACE deletes all entities before importing; default is MERGE.

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: Actor identity for audit log; defaults to system

200.description: Import completed (see errors[] for non-fatal issues)

400.description: Malformed YAML or missing file part

get.description: Returns all registered facet types. Filter by targetType (entity-type URN or slug) and/or enabledOnly to narrow results.

parameters.name: targetType
parameters.description: Filter by entity-type URN or slug, e.g. table

parameters.name: enabledOnly
parameters.description: If true, return only enabled facet types

post.description: Creates a new custom facet type. The typeKey in the request body is normalised to URN form. Returns 201 with a Location header on success.

get.description: Returns entity identities only (no facets). Optional `kind` filters by persisted kind. `schema` / `table` query parameters are not supported — use the schema explorer API.

parameters.name: kind
parameters.description: Filter by persisted entity kind (opaque string, equality match)

400.description: Legacy schema/table query parameters are not accepted

get.description: Returns effective [FacetInstanceDto] rows for one facet type after scope merge.

parameters.name: typeKey
parameters.description: Facet type slug or URN, e.g. descriptive

200.description: Assignments for this facet type after merge (empty if none)

post.description: POST payload to assign a facet at `?scope=` (default global). SINGLE cardinality updates in place when a row exists.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Target scope URN or slug; defaults to global

delete.summary: Delete all facet assignments of a type at a scope
delete.description: `scope` query parameter is required. Applies per-row unassign rules (SET+global → delete; overlay → tombstone).

get.summary: List chats for the current user

post.description: Creates a general chat when no context fields are set. For contextual chats the existing chat for (contextType, contextId) is returned if one already exists. Returns 201 when a new chat was created, 200 when an existing contextual singleton was reused.

get.summary: List durable message transcript for a chat

post.summary: Send a message and stream the response via SSE
post.description: Returns a stream of server-sent events. Each event `data` field carries a JSON-serialised ChatSseEvent. Event types: `item.created`, `item.diagnostic`, `item.part.updated`, `item.tool.call`, `item.tool.result`, `item.completed`, `item.failed`. `item.diagnostic` carries UX status (code, message, optional detail) before the reply completes. Streaming consumers should accumulate `item.part.updated` deltas; `item.completed.content` is `null` when deltas were emitted — use the accumulated text. `item.completed.content` is non-null only when no deltas preceded (non-streaming fallback path). Runtime errors that occur after the stream is opened (e.g. model failures) are delivered in-stream as `item.failed` events rather than as HTTP error responses.

200.description: SSE stream opened; events follow. Runtime failures after stream start are delivered as in-stream `item.failed` events.

404.description: Chat not found — returned before the SSE stream is opened

delete.description: Deletes one assignment by uid. Global SET rows are removed; overlay SET rows become TOMBSTONE (SPEC §10.2).

404.description: Entity or persisted facet row not found

422.description: Facet uid refers to a read-only inferred row (not persisted)

patch.description: PATCH replaces payload for the row identified by `{facetUid}`.

404.description: Entity or persisted facet row not found

422.description: Facet uid refers to a read-only inferred row (not persisted)

parameters.name: facetMode
parameters.description: Facet expansion policy: none | direct | hierarchy

parameters.name: facetMode
parameters.description: Facet expansion policy: none | direct | hierarchy

parameters.name: facetMode
parameters.description: Facet expansion policy: none | direct | hierarchy

parameters.name: facetMode
parameters.description: Facet expansion policy: none | direct | hierarchy

404.description: Schema, table, or column not found

parameters.name: facetMode
parameters.description: Facet expansion policy: none | direct | hierarchy

parameters.name: facetMode
parameters.description: Facet expansion policy: none | direct | hierarchy

get.description: Returns all entities with facets filtered to the requested scope. Custom facet types are included in a facet-types: preamble section. All keys use full URN notation.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Scope key (full URN or slug, e.g. global); defaults to global scope

get.summary: Get merged facets for an entity
get.description: Returns effective facet rows after scope merge (SPEC §10.2). `?scope=` orders scopes (last wins).

200.description: Merged facet instances (empty array if no entity row or no assignments)

get.description: Returns every persisted facet row for the entity with merge_action and whether it contributes to the effective merged view for the given context order (SPEC §10.5).

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Comma-separated scope URNs / slugs, evaluation order (preferred)

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: Optional comma-separated origin ids for contribution filtering

200.description: All persisted facet rows for this entity id (may be empty if no metadata row or no assignments)

get.summary: Get a single agent profile by id
Look up a context-bound chat by (contextType, contextId)

404.description: No chat exists for this context

delete.description: Deletes the scope identified by scopeSlug. Returns 409 if attempting to delete the global scope.

parameters.name: scopeSlug
parameters.description: Local scope slug, e.g. user:alice or team:eng

MetadataEntity.description: Metadata entity identity. No schema/table/column coordinates and no facets map — use facet endpoints.

lastModifiedBy.description: Actor who last modified the entity

FacetInstance.description: Facet row: type, scope, provenance (origin / originId / assignmentUid), payload, and stable uid. No mergeAction — use merge-trace for overlay diagnostics.

origin.description: Facet provenance: CAPTURED (persisted assignment) or INFERRED (read-time)

assignmentUid.description: Stable assignment uid when origin is CAPTURED; absent for pure INFERRED rows

uid.description: Stable or synthetic facet row id

assignmentUid.description: Persisted assignment uid when origin is CAPTURED

type.description: Canonical Mill type identifier, e.g. STRING, BIG_INT, DECIMAL

nullable.description: Whether the column type allows null values

FacetMergeTraceEntryDto.description: Single facet row in a merge-trace response.

FacetMergeTraceResponseDto.description: Facet merge trace: raw assignments plus merge_action and effective-view flags.

scopes.description: Ordered scope URNs used for merge
